meta.title: How We Work — Uttara Farm
meta.description: Learn Uttara Farm's direct farmer support model: consultation, on-farm evaluation, regular consultant visits, and support for infrastructure, funding, knowledge, and distribution.

title: How We Work
lead: Uttara Farm works directly with farmers through a practical, field-first model focused on consultation, regular advisor visits, and end-to-end support from production to market access.
footnote: The process runs as a continuous loop: step 5 links back to step 1, and each node can be expanded as the operating model grows.

steps.title: 1. Consultation
steps.detail: Understand farmer goals, constraints, and coming season priorities.

steps.title: 2. Overview & evaluation
steps.detail: Assess conditions, crop potential, and risk gaps early.

steps.title: 3. Regular field support
steps.detail: Season-long consultant visits for timely, practical crop decisions.

steps.title: 4. Infrastructure & funding
steps.detail: Close critical capability gaps with practical interventions.

steps.title: 5. Knowledge & market enablement
steps.detail: Build farmer capability and connect produce to stronger market pathways.
